# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

cluster.name: "search-infra-cluster"
node.name: "single-node-search"
network.host: "0.0.0.0"
http.port: 9200
transport.tcp.port: 9300

# Disable security features for no credential management overhead
xpack.security.enabled: false

# Enable CORS to allow access from various clients
http.cors.enabled: true
http.cors.allow-origin: "/https?:\/\/.*"

# Set up node roles
node.master: true
node.data: true
node.ingest: true
node.ml: false

# Configure JVM options for memory management (adjust based on your system resources)
JVM.options:
  -Xms2g
  -Xmx2g

# Elasticsearch index settings (customize as needed for your product search and logging)
index.number_of_shards: 1
index.number_of_replicas: 0

# Logging configuration to monitor the cluster effectively
logging.level.root: INFO
logging.level.elasticsearch: DEBUG
